In affected applications that use the vulnerable local cryptography path, specially crafted encrypted input may bypass integrity verification checks. Operations delegated to the Key Vault service are not affected. The issue is addressed in version 4.10.6.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00479, "percentile": 0.37593}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-97jf-46m3-8953", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-02T22:18:30Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-97jf-46m3-8953", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-97jf-46m3-8953"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-33117"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-12T18:17:04Z", "published_at": "2026-05-12T18:30:42Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-33117", "https://msrc.microsoft.com/update-guide/vulnerability/CVE-2026-33117", "https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-java/pull/48476", "https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-java/commit/1b5c5c79d85a5c9a9cfd07f6cdff6fd0f50eccf9", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-97jf-46m3-8953"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-java", "summary": "Security feature bypass vulnerability in Azure Key Vault Keys library for Java", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-02T22:18:30Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-97jf-46m3-8953", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "4.10.6", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "com.azure:azure-security-keyvault-keys"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 4.10.6"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Security feature bypass vulnerability in Azure Key Vault Keys library for Java
